name: openEuler sig-SDS SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-SDS SIG maintains 17 repositories in the Storage domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-SDS SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for openEuler Software-Defined-Storage(SDS) SIG. The SIG has 16 core members and maintains 17 repositories in the Storage domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-SDS SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-SDS SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sds@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-SDS SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-SDS SIG maintains 17 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-SDS.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-SDS SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-SDS SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: xinze chi, zhiqiang liu, qinfei liu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
